message:
fix(abi): prevent OnceLock deadlock in allocator host resolution

The OnceLock-based host allocator resolution (17416b9) used get_or_init()
which calls futex during _dl_init, deadlocking under LD_PRELOAD because
dlvsym_next goes through our interposed dlsym which needs malloc.

Fix: host_*_fn() accessors now use OnceLock::get() (non-blocking read)
and return None if not yet resolved. The prewarm_host_allocator_symbols()
function (called from __libc_start_main AFTER _dl_init) populates the
OnceLocks via get_or_init() when dlvsym is safe to call.

Before prewarm: all allocations go through bump/mmap allocator (safe).
After prewarm: allocations use the host glibc allocator (fast).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
